institution: Khon Kaen University · Faculty of Associated Medical Sciences
story: Following the 2025 KKU delegation, Medical Technology students joined laboratory learning and research activities at NTU in 2026.
storyZh: 延續 2025 年 KKU 師生團來訪，醫學技術學生於 2026 年進一步加入臺大的實驗室學習與研究活動。

kindZh: 研究駐點與 e-skin 合作
story: Vrahant Nagoria joined the India–Taiwan collaboration to prototype wearable and electrochemical sensing concepts, connecting academic and industry perspectives.
storyZh: Vrahant Nagoria 參與台印合作，投入穿戴與電化學感測原型，連結學術與產業觀點。

institution: HCMUT · Mongolia University of Science and Technology
story: Vietnamese students contribute to microfluidic, biosensing, and field-measurement projects, while the Mongolia collaboration connects microfluidics with electrochemical biosensing and technical training.
storyZh: 越南學生參與微流體、生醫感測與場域量測；蒙古合作則把微流體、電化學生醫感測與技術訓練連結起來。

institution: MIT · University of Toronto · Purdue · UT Austin
story: Summer visitors and long-standing academic links create a two-way exchange: students gain laboratory experience while the group gains new technical and international perspectives.
storyZh: 暑期訪問與長期學術連結形成雙向交流：學生獲得實驗室經驗，團隊也獲得新的技術與國際觀點。
